'''Matty Laidlaw''' (born 22 January 2004) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|pr}} for [[Hull FC]] in the [[Super League]].

==Playing career==
=== Hull FC ===
In 2022 he made his [[Hull F.C.|Hull]] début in the [[Super League]] against [[Hull Kingston Rovers]].<ref>[https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/match/EVP3771714 Hull Kingston Rovers 28-34 Hull FC]</ref>

=== Keighley Cougars (loan)===
On 14 July 2023 he joined [[Keighley Cougars]] on loan for the rest of 2023 to gain valuable game time playing in the [[RFL Championship]].<ref>{{cite web|website=Total RL|date=14 Jul 2023|accessdate=15 Jul 2023|title=Keighley Cougars add Super League prop to their ranks in bid against Championship relegation|url=https://www.totalrl.com/keighley-cougars-add-super-league-prop-to-their-ranks-in-bid-against-championship-relegation/}}</ref>

===Hunslet RLFC (loan)===
On 5 March 2026 it was reported that he had signed for [[Hunslet RLFC]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on one-month loan<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=5 Mar 2026|author=Louis Chapman Coombe|title=Hull FC young gun makes Championship loan switch with immediate effect|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/hull-fc-young-gun-makes-championship-loan-switch-with-immediate-effect}}</ref>
